title: Add rewrite mode to arc-sync injection prompt
problem: When arc-sync encounters an existing README without ARC: markers, there is no rewrite path available. Product Owners must manually migrate content, introducing errors and wasted effort.
proposed_solution: Offer a rewrite option that reads the existing README holistically and re-homes content into ARC:/TEMPER: managed sections.
success_criteria: arc-sync detects injection mode when ARC: markers are absent.
User is prompted to choose between inject and rewrite modes.
constraints: Must preserve all non-ARC content from the existing README.
assumptions: The existing README is well-formed UTF-8 text.
